creator: legatvs@gmail.com
text:
OK.

> Perhaps the default naming scheme should be changed as well
> to give a .mp4 suffix to downloaded files, rather than .mp4_hd.

Agreed. I think cclive should copy the suffix handling from clive
which parses the returned content-type for each video file. This
should be fixed in 0.3.1.

I'll merge these (clive, clive-utils, cclive) changes to the
appropriate projects. Thanks again.
